coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] At 10+ [Vibration] Count, spend all [Vibration] Count to inflict target with the same amount of [Vibration] Count
[OnSucceedAttack] At less than 10 [Vibration] Count, gain 6 [Vibration] and trigger [VibrationExplosion] on self
Deal Blunt damage equal to [VibrationExplosion] damage

descs.desc: Coin Power +1 for every 10 [Vibration] Count on self (Max 2)

1100701.name: Unstable Power Output
1100701.desc: On hit with Heads Coins at 10+ [Vibration] Count on self, Inflict +1 [Vibration] and [Vibration] Count with Coin effects.

1100721.name: Modified Power Output
1100721.desc: 1 ally with the most Max HP inflicts +1 [Vibration] with the effects of their attack skills/coins.
